item.title: Louvre Director Resigns, Months After Crown Jewels Were Stolen in Heist
item.description: Laurence des Cars’s departure is the latest setback for the world’s largest museum. Her tenure was marred by labor strikes, water leaks, a ticket scam...

item.title: Mexico Is Caught Between Trump and the Cartels
item.description: President Trump has demanded President Claudia Sheinbaum confront the cartels. The killing of El Mencho suggests it might be working — but could come ...

item.title: Ukraine Battlefield Dead Could Reach 500,000 in Fifth Year, Estimates Suggest
item.description: Russia has lost as many as 325,000 troops, according to some estimates, with more than 200,000 deaths verified by researchers.

item.title: How Former Prince Andrew’s Ties to Epstein Led to His Downfall
item.description: Last week, the British authorities arrested the former Prince Andrew amid allegations that he shared confidential government information with Jeffrey ...

item.title: Study Shows Xi’s Purges of China’s Military Run Deep
item.description: Around 100 senior officers have been sidelined or vanished since 2022, hollowing out the top ranks and raising questions about the army’s capabilities...
